items.title: Total Patients in View
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients Prescribed Metformin in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals within the view who have Metformin indicated in their EHR.

Sample: All N3C Patients.

Even without filters, this total may be less than the total number of patients prescribed Metformin within the Enclave due to the suppression of counts less than 20.
